title: The J2CL/Lit workflow doc now defines how to use Stitch, image generation, and specs together
summary: The new workflow doc explains that parity work should stay code/spec-first, use Stitch as the main structured design accelerator, and use image-generation tools only for visual direction and moodboards.

items: Added a dedicated J2CL/Lit implementation workflow doc that explains how to move from current GWT behavior inventory to approved Lit implementation slices
Documented a concrete tool split: Stitch for screen/design-system exploration, image generation for visual direction, and code/specs as the behavioral source of truth
